directly degrading the client experience — not stated in the source document; inference removed

'making it impossible to reliably meet the 3-business-day target for bespoke applications' — overstates the document; document says the SLA is measured for standard-wording only and that bespoke adds unpredictable delay, not that meeting it is impossible; rewritten to reflect document text
source demoted from 'document' to 'proposed': 'actual performance is not tracked' is an inference; the document is silent on whether tracking exists, not explicit that it does not

'AML directives require the bank to identify and assess money-laundering risk in the underlying transaction' — the document names AML directives but does not describe what they specifically require; hallucinated content removed

All specifics about URDG 758 content ('form, presentation and payment obligations', 'wording, expiry', 'complying demand must be honoured') — the document names URDG 758 but does not describe its requirements; hallucinated content removed; provenance demoted from 'proposed' (already proposed in draft) and body reduced to traceable statement only

'ensures guarantee text conforms to URDG 758 requirements' and 'provides additional assurance of compliance' — Step 3 describes wording review but does not mention URDG 758 conformance; inference removed; provenance confirmed as 'proposed'
Incomplete applications are returned to the client for correction before progressing — not stated in the document; removed.
"Application returned to client (if incomplete)" — not stated in the document; removed from Outputs list.
"to arrange a limit increase" — the document says the application is routed to the Credit team but does not state the purpose is to arrange a limit increase; removed.
Provenance was marked 'document'; demoted to 'proposed' — the rationale text is inference, not stated in the document.
"The Legal team assesses the proposed wording for legal risk and confirms or amends it" — not in the document (which only says 'review and sign-off'); removed.

"The application may only resume if Compliance clears the hit; otherwise it is declined" — the document only says the hit suspends the application pending investigation; 'otherwise it is declined' is not stated; removed.
"Screening audit trail recorded" — not stated in the document; removed from Outputs list.
Provenance was marked 'document' for the full block including unsupported items; retained as 'document' only for the two explicitly supported claims; evidence tightened.

"including the credit check outcome, approved wording and clear sanctions result" — the document says 'assembled package' without listing its contents; enumerated contents removed.
"against errors and fraud" and "largest exposure items" — not stated in the document; rewritten to what the document supports.

Phrase 'Owns the end-to-end operational handling' and 'executed instrument' — ownership language and 'executed instrument' are inferences not present in the document. Block rewritten down to document-supported tasks.

Phrase 'triggers SWIFT transmission' — document says the guarantee 'is transmitted to the beneficiary's bank via SWIFT' (passive; TFO's role in triggering SWIFT is not stated). Rewritten to passive form matching source.
Provenance demoted from 'document' to 'proposed' because 'end-to-end ownership' framing is an inference across multiple passages, not a verbatim document statement.

Phrase 'senior escalation approval', 'second layer of sign-off above the Trade Finance Manager', and 'exposures above EUR 5 million' — hierarchy inference is unsupported; 'exposures' substitutes for document's 'guarantee amount'. Block rewritten to document-supported text.

Phrase 'before the guarantee can be issued in those cases' — the document states the sign-off is required but does not explicitly sequence it as a precondition for issuance in those words. Rewritten to remove the unsupported causal framing.

Phrase 'manages any screening hits through to resolution' — document says 'suspends the application pending Compliance investigation'; resolution outcome is not described. Removed 'through to resolution'.

Phrase 'Handles facility limit increases' — document says the application is routed to the Credit team but does not state the Credit team performs limit increases. Action rewritten to match what the document actually says.
Phrase 'to arrange a limit increase' — document does not describe what the Credit team does once routed the application; action is an inference. Removed.
Phrase 'ensuring legal soundness' — document does not describe the purpose of Legal review in these terms. Removed.

Provenance demoted from 'document' to 'proposed' for the sequencing claim 'before the application advances to sanctions screening and issuance approval' — step ordering is inferred from the numbered step sequence, not from a verbatim document statement.
